title: Poland Sole Proprietorship Registration (CEIDG-1, wniosek o wpis przedsiębiorcy do CEIDG)
description: The Polish CEIDG-1 form, 'Wniosek o wpis do Centralnej Ewidencji i Informacji o Działalności Gospodarczej' (Application for Entry into the Central Registration and Information on Business), through which a natural person registers as a sole trader (jednoosobowa działalność gospodarcza) with CEIDG. A single CEIDG-1 filing simultaneously registers the applicant with ZUS or KRUS (social insurance), GUS (statistics office, which assigns REGON), and the tax office (which assigns NIP if not already held) — CEIDG-1 itself states this ('Wniosek ten stanowi jednocześnie zgłoszenie do ZUS/KRUS, GUS oraz naczelnika urzędu skarbowego'). The live form (current version 1.8.9) is also used, with different required sections, for four other purposes — amending an existing entry, suspending activity, resuming activity, and deregistering — selected via a 'rodzaj wniosku' (application type) radio choice on its cover page. This document models ONLY the first pathway: a brand-new registration (typ 1, 'wniosek o wpis do CEIDG przedsiębiorcy'). See VERIFICATION.md for the full scope note and every field/section deliberately excluded (the other four request types and their type-specific sections; the KRUS-specific declaration block; several bounded but rarely-used continuation annexes referenced by checkbox from the main form). GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Poland, CEIDG, or the Ministerstwo Rozwoju i Technologii.

authority.name: Centralna Ewidencja i Informacja o Działalności Gospodarczej

operatedBy.name: Ministerstwo Rozwoju i Technologii
operatedBy.basis: Ustawa z dnia 6 marca 2018 r. o Centralnej Ewidencji i Informacji o Działalności Gospodarczej i Punkcie Informacji dla Przedsiębiorcy (Dz. U. z 2018 r. poz. 647, z późn. zm.)

source.documentRef: CEIDG-1 (form version 1.8.9), Wniosek o wpis do Centralnej Ewidencji i Informacji o Działalności Gospodarczej — a genuine, current, unauthenticated PDF hosted directly on ceidg.gov.pl with no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate, its own printed section numbers (01–30) self-documenting every field's label in full

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle (GOV-1671). Poland opened as the registry's 22nd jurisdiction in the prior cycle (GOV-1666, National ID) with its other five verticals open. This cycle screened Poland's DMV candidate first per the research brief's recommended order — the Załącznik nr 1 wzór wniosku o rejestrację, czasową rejestrację albo wyrejestrowanie pojazdu (Rozporządzenie Ministra Infrastruktury z dnia 8 listopada 2024 r., Dz.U. 2024 poz. 1709), fetched directly — and found it a genuine, current, unauthenticated PDF but a materially thinner source (a single A5/A4 page with only 7 numbered data fields plus a free-text attachment list, versus CEIDG-1's 30 numbered sections). CEIDG-1 was picked instead: same sourcing strength (unauthenticated, current, directly downloadable, self-documenting numbered fields) but substantially richer field coverage, and it is the natural next Business Formation candidate the research brief itself suggested. Cross-checked against CEIDG-1's own official 'Instrukcja wypełniania wniosku CEIDG-1' guide (biznes.gov.pl, dated 2025-01-07) for section-by-section field explanations and the closed enumerated values used for taxationForm, mandatoryInsuranceScheme, and citizenship — note the instruction guide targets a slightly earlier form revision with different section numbers (unprefixed '1., 2., 5.1...' versus the downloaded form's zero-padded '01., 03., 06.2...'), but its field-by-field content and required-field list match the downloaded form's own text layer field-for-field, confirming no substantive drift between the two. Screened and rejected as weaker/out of scope this cycle: Poland's KRS/S24 online company-registration portal (authenticated, session-based, no static form); Poland's Taxes vertical (e-Deklaracje/Twój e-PIT, both requiring an authenticated session, not screened in depth this cycle — left as backlog); Poland's Visa vertical (not screened in depth — likely duplicates the EU-harmonized de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application template per this registry's own precedent, left as backlog with that hypothesis flagged for a future cycle to confirm); Poland's Passport vertical (not screened in depth — left as backlog). See VERIFICATION.md for the full candidate-comparison record and every disclosed judgment call/scope limitation.

fields.name: gender
fields.label: 1. Płeć
fields.description: The applicant's sex, one of the form's own two closed options.

fields.name: identityDocumentType
fields.label: 2a. Rodzaj dokumentu tożsamości
fields.description: The kind of identity document the applicant is registering with.

fields.name: identityDocumentTypeOther
fields.label: 2a. ...podać jaki
fields.description: Free-text description of the identity document type, required only when identityDocumentType is 'inny' (other).

fields.name: identityDocumentNumber
fields.label: 2b. Seria i numer dokumentu tożsamości
fields.description: The series and number of the identity document named in identityDocumentType.

fields.name: pesel
fields.label: 3. PESEL
fields.description: The applicant's 11-digit PESEL (Powszechny Elektroniczny System Ewidencji Ludności) national identification number. The form's own 'Nie posiadam numeru PESEL' (I do not have a PESEL number) checkbox branch for foreign applicants with no PESEL is out of scope for v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: nip
fields.label: 4. NIP
fields.description: The applicant's 10-digit NIP (Numer Identyfikacji Podatkowej) tax identification number, if already held from a prior tax registration. Most first-time applicants leave this blank (the form itself offers a 'Nie posiadam NIP' checkbox) since CEIDG registration is what assigns a NIP.

fields.name: regon
fields.label: 5. REGON
fields.description: The applicant's 9-digit REGON (business statistical number), if already held. Almost always blank for a brand-new registration, since GUS assigns REGON as a consequence of this application, not before it.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: 6. Nazwisko
fields.description: The applicant's surname, spelled as on the identity document named above.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: 7. Imię pierwsze
fields.description: The applicant's first given name.

fields.name: maidenSurname
fields.label: 8. Nazwisko rodowe
fields.description: The applicant's maiden/birth surname, if different from the current surname.

fields.name: secondFirstName
fields.label: 9. Imię drugie
fields.description: The applicant's second given name, if they have one.

fields.name: fathersFirstName
fields.label: 10. Imię ojca
fields.description: The first name of the applicant's father.

fields.name: mothersFirstName
fields.label: 11. Imię matki
fields.description: The first name of the applicant's mother.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: 12. Miejsce urodzenia
fields.description: The applicant's place of birth.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: 13. Data urodzenia
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth (RRRR-MM-DD).

fields.name: citizenship
fields.label: 14. Posiadane obywatelstwa
fields.description: The applicant's declared citizenship status: polskie (Polish), brak (holds no citizenship of any country), or inne (another/other citizenship, specified in citizenshipOther). The live form allows naming more than one 'inne' citizenship in free text; this schema models the single free-text value as printed.

fields.name: citizenshipOther
fields.label: 14. Inne
fields.description: Free-text name(s) of the applicant's non-Polish citizenship(s), required only when citizenship is 'inne'.

fields.name: lawfulActivityDeclaration
fields.label: 15. Oświadczam, że...
fields.description: Confirmation of the form's own statutory declaration (CEIDG-1 §03.15): that no final prohibition under art. 5 ust. 2 pkt 13-15 of the CEIDG Act has been ruled against the applicant, that the applicant holds legal title to the properties whose addresses are entered in CEIDG, and that the applicant is aware of the criminal liability (Kodeks karny art. 233 § 6) for a false declaration. See documents[].id 'lawfulActivityAttestation' for the verbatim statement text.

fields.name: residenceCountry
fields.label: 1. Kraj
fields.description: Country of the applicant's residential address.

fields.name: residenceVoivodeship
fields.label: 2. Województwo
fields.description: Voivodeship (province) of the residential address. Left blank for a non-Polish address.

fields.name: residencePowiat
fields.label: 3. Powiat
fields.description: Powiat (county) of the residential address. For a city with powiat rights, the instruction guide says to use the city's own name (e.g. 'Poznań', not the adjectival 'poznański'). Left blank for a non-Polish address.

fields.name: residenceGminaOrDistrict
fields.label: 4. Gmina/Dzielnica
fields.description: Gmina (municipality) or city district of the residential address. Left blank for a non-Polish address.

fields.name: residenceCity
fields.label: 5. Miejscowość
fields.description: City/town/village of the residential address.

fields.name: residenceStreet
fields.label: 6. Ulica
fields.description: Street of the residential address.

fields.name: residenceHouseNumber
fields.label: 7. Nr nieruchomości/domu
fields.description: House/building number of the residential address.

fields.name: residenceApartmentNumber
fields.label: 8. Numer lokalu
fields.description: Apartment/unit number of the residential address.

fields.name: residencePostalCode
fields.label: 9. Kod pocztowy
fields.description: Postal code of the residential address.

fields.name: residencePostOffice
fields.label: 10. Poczta
fields.description: Post office name serving the residential address.

fields.name: residenceAtypicalLocationDescription
fields.label: 11. Opis nietypowego miejsca
fields.description: Free-text description of the residential address, used only when it does not fit the standard street/number scheme (e.g. a rural settlement with no street names).

fields.name: epuapAddress
fields.label: 1. Adres elektroniczny
fields.description: The applicant's electronic delivery address on the ePUAP platform (or the tax portal), used for official electronic correspondence.

fields.name: epuapAddressWaived
fields.label: 2. Rezygnacja z adresu elektronicznego
fields.description: Whether the applicant is withdrawing a previously-declared ePUAP delivery address.

fields.name: businessName
fields.label: 06. Firma przedsiębiorcy
fields.description: The registered name of the business (firma), which by law must include the entrepreneur's own first and last name.

fields.name: expectedNumberOfWorkers
fields.label: 06.1. Przewidywana liczba pracujących
fields.description: Expected headcount of people working in the business, including the owner, family members registered as collaborating persons, and employees under an employment contract.

fields.name: primaryPkdCode
fields.label: 06.2.1 Przeważający kod PKD
fields.description: The single main/predominant 5-character PKD 2007 (Polska Klasyfikacja Działalności) business-activity code, expected to generate the largest share of revenue. Format: two digits, a dot, two digits, a letter (e.g. 47.11.Z).

fields.name: secondaryPkdCode
fields.label: 06.2.2 Kod PKD
fields.description: An additional PKD business-activity code, if the business performs more than one kind of activity.

fields.name: tertiaryPkdCode
fields.label: 06.2.3 Kod PKD
fields.description: A third PKD business-activity code, if applicable.

fields.name: additionalPkdCodesAnnexAttached
fields.label: 06.2 Kontynuacja w załączniku CEIDG-RD
fields.description: Whether the applicant is declaring more PKD codes than fit on the main form (up to 9 slots), continued on the separate CEIDG-RD annex form. That annex's own field set is out of scope for v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md and documents[].id 'pkdContinuationAnnex'.

fields.name: shortName
fields.label: 07. Nazwa skrócona
fields.description: A short name for the business (up to 31 characters), used on ZUS correspondence. If left blank, the entrepreneur's own first and last name is used.

fields.name: businessStartDate
fields.label: 08. Data rozpoczęcia działalności
fields.description: The declared start date of business activity. May be a past, current, or future date.

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.label: 1. Numer telefonu
fields.description: Contact phone number.

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.label: 2. Adres poczty elektronicznej
fields.description: Contact email address.

fields.name: faxNumber
fields.label: 3. Numer faksu
fields.description: Contact fax number.

fields.name: websiteUrl
fields.label: 4. Strona WWW
fields.description: Business website address.

fields.name: contactDataSharingOptOut
fields.label: 09. Sprzeciwiam się udostępnianiu danych kontaktowych z CEIDG
fields.description: Whether the applicant is opting out of having the contact details above published in the public CEIDG register.

fields.name: correspondenceAddressee
fields.label: 1. Adresat
fields.description: Name of the addressee for correspondence, if different from the applicant.

fields.name: correspondenceCity
fields.label: 6. Miejscowość
fields.description: City/town/village of the correspondence address.

fields.name: correspondenceStreet
fields.label: 7. Ulica
fields.description: Street of the correspondence address.

fields.name: correspondenceHouseNumber
fields.label: 8. Nr nieruchomości/domu
fields.description: House/building number of the correspondence address.

fields.name: correspondenceApartmentNumber
fields.label: 9. Numer lokalu
fields.description: Apartment/unit number of the correspondence address.

fields.name: correspondencePostalCode
fields.label: 10. Kod pocztowy
fields.description: Postal code of the correspondence address.

fields.name: correspondencePostOffice
fields.label: 11. Poczta
fields.description: Post office name serving the correspondence address.

fields.name: correspondencePostBox
fields.label: 12. Skrytka pocztowa
fields.description: PO box number for correspondence, if used.

fields.name: noFixedBusinessLocation
fields.label: 10.2. Brak stałego miejsca wykonywania działalności gospodarczej
fields.description: Whether the business has no permanent place of business (e.g. a fully mobile or itinerant activity). When true, the residential address is used for tax purposes instead and the businessLocation* fields below do not apply.

fields.name: businessLocationVoivodeship
fields.label: 1. Województwo
fields.description: Voivodeship of the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationPowiat
fields.label: 2. Powiat
fields.description: Powiat of the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationGminaOrDistrict
fields.label: 3. Gmina/Dzielnica
fields.description: Gmina or city district of the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationCity
fields.label: 4. Miejscowość
fields.description: City/town/village of the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationStreet
fields.label: 5. Ulica
fields.description: Street of the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationHouseNumber
fields.label: 6. Nr nieruchomości/domu
fields.description: House/building number of the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationApartmentNumber
fields.label: 7. Numer lokalu
fields.description: Apartment/unit number of the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationPostalCode
fields.label: 8. Kod pocztowy
fields.description: Postal code of the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationPostOffice
fields.label: 9. Poczta
fields.description: Post office name serving the permanent place of business.

fields.name: businessLocationAtypicalDescription
fields.label: 10. Opis nietypowego miejsca
fields.description: Free-text description of the permanent place of business, used only when it does not fit the standard street/number scheme.

fields.name: mandatoryInsuranceScheme
fields.label: 12. Podlegam obowiązkowemu ubezpieczeniu w
fields.description: Which mandatory social-insurance institution the applicant is registering under: zus (Zakład Ubezpieczeń Społecznych), krus (Kasa Rolniczego Ubezpieczenia Społecznego, for farmers), or insured_abroad (already insured in another country). Exactly one applies, per the form's own instruction.

fields.name: zusContributionObligationStartDate
fields.label: 12.1. Data powstania obowiązku opłacania składek ZUS
fields.description: The date the applicant's obligation to pay ZUS contributions begins, required when mandatoryInsuranceScheme is 'zus'.

fields.name: currentTaxOfficeName
fields.label: 17. Aktualny naczelnik urzędu skarbowego
fields.description: Name of the tax office (urząd skarbowy) responsible for the applicant's income-tax settlement — ordinarily the office for the applicant's place of residence.

fields.name: taxationForm
fields.label: 18. Oświadczam, że podatek dochodowy od osób fizycznych będę opłacać w formie
fields.description: The elected personal-income-tax method: general_rules (na zasadach ogólnych, progressive scale), flat_tax (podatek liniowy, 19% flat), lump_sum_revenue (ryczałt od przychodów ewidencjonowanych), or tax_card (karty podatkowej). If left unelected on the live form, general_rules applies automatically per AEAT-equivalent CEIDG-1 instruction guide. Note: karta podatkowa (tax_card) has been closed to new elections since the 2022 'Polski Ład' reform and remains on the form only for continuing cases; see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: pit16Attached
fields.label: 18. Dołączam wniosek PIT-16
fields.description: Whether the PIT-16 supplementary form is attached, required when taxationForm is 'tax_card'.

fields.name: accountingBooksNoticeSubmitted
fields.label: 19. Składam zawiadomienie
fields.description: Whether the applicant is filing the optional notice electing to keep full accounting books (księgi rachunkowe) in the next financial year, instead of the simplified records the chosen taxationForm would otherwise imply.

fields.name: shelteredWorkshopStatus
fields.label: 22. Prowadzę zakład pracy chronionej
fields.description: Whether the business holds 'zakład pracy chronionej' (sheltered workshop) status. The instruction guide notes this does not apply to a brand-new registration (status requires ≥12 months of prior trading), so this is expected false for a first-time filing.

fields.name: soleActivityViaCivilPartnership
fields.label: 23. Prowadzę działalność gospodarczą wyłącznie w formie spółki/spółek cywilnych
fields.description: Whether the applicant conducts business exclusively through one or more civil-law partnerships (spółka cywilna), rather than as an individual sole trader.

fields.name: civilPartnershipNip
fields.label: 24.1. NIP spółki
fields.description: The NIP of the civil partnership named in soleActivityViaCivilPartnership, required when that flag is true.

fields.name: civilPartnershipRegon
fields.label: 24.2. REGON spółki
fields.description: The REGON of the civil partnership named above, required when soleActivityViaCivilPartnership is true.

fields.name: maritalPropertyCommunity
fields.label: 25.1. Łączy mnie z małżonkiem wspólność majątkowa
fields.description: Whether the applicant is in a marital community-property regime with a spouse: tak (yes), nie (no), or nie_dotyczy (not applicable, e.g. unmarried).

fields.name: maritalPropertyCeasedDate
fields.label: 25.2. Małżeńska wspólność majątkowa ustała dnia
fields.description: The date a former marital community-property regime ceased, if applicable.

fields.name: businessBankAccountCountry
fields.label: 1. Kraj siedziby banku (oddziału)
fields.description: Country of the bank branch holding the business bank account.

fields.name: businessBankAccountSwiftCode
fields.label: 2. Kod SWIFT
fields.description: SWIFT/BIC code, required only for a foreign bank account (8-11 characters).

fields.name: businessBankAccountBankName
fields.label: 3. Pełna nazwa banku (oddziału)
fields.description: Full name of the bank/branch.

fields.name: businessBankAccountHolder
fields.label: 4. Posiadacz rachunku
fields.description: Name of the account holder.

fields.name: businessBankAccountNumber
fields.label: 5. Numer rachunku
fields.description: The business bank account number (5-26 characters, e.g. a 26-digit Polish IBAN without the country prefix).

fields.name: businessBankAccountForTaxRefund
fields.label: 7. Rachunek, na który dokonywany będzie zwrot podatku
fields.description: Whether this account is nominated to receive tax refunds. A foreign account cannot be nominated for this purpose per the form's own note.

documents.label: Statutory declaration of no activity ban and of legal title to registered premises
documents.statement: Oświadczam, że wobec osoby, której wpis dotyczy, nie orzeczono prawomocnie zakazów, o których mowa w art. 5 ust. 2 pkt 13-15 ustawy z dnia 6 marca 2018 r. o Centralnej Ewidencji i Informacji o Działalności Gospodarczej i Punkcie Informacji dla Przedsiębiorcy w zakresie działalności gospodarczej objętej wpisem, oraz, że osoba, której wpis dotyczy, posiada tytuł prawny do nieruchomości, których adresy są wpisywane do CEIDG. Jestem świadomy odpowiedzialności karnej za złożenie fałszywego oświadczenia.

documents.label: CEIDG-RD annex (additional PKD business-activity codes beyond the 3 slots this schema models / 9 slots the main form provides)
